_comment: DEFERRED — Hand-labeled calibration data not yet collected (Plan 01-06 Task 1). This file currently contains only schema-example rows marked is_example=true so the validator script does not crash on an empty file. Per Phase 1 SUMMARY: calibration data collection is a Phase 3 follow-up. Per D-19/D-20: the dashboard maintainer must hand-label 20-30 promo snippets per non-English language (TH, VN, TW, HK, ID = 5 languages, target 100-150 lines total). Per D-21: this is NOT a Phase 1 blocker — Plans 01-05 (Apify cutover) ship without it. Each row schema: {market, language, input_text, expected_output, source_url, [is_example]}. is_example=true rows MUST be filtered out by the validator (see scrapers/calibration/validate_extraction.py).

input_text: EXAMPLE — replace with real scraped Thai-language promo page snippet from promo_snapshots table. e.g. 'รับโบนัสเงินฝาก 50% สูงสุด $5,000 เมื่อฝากเงินครั้งแรก ใช้ได้ถึง 31 พ.ค. 2569'
EXAMPLE — replace with real Vietnamese promo snippet. e.g. 'Tặng $30 không cần ký quỹ cho tài khoản mới. Ưu đãi có hạn đến 30/06/2026.'
EXAMPLE — replace with real Traditional Chinese promo snippet. e.g. '新客戶首次入金返現20%，最高 $1,000 美元，活動至 2026/06/15 截止'
EXAMPLE — replace with real Hong Kong (Traditional Chinese, with HK-specific terms) promo snippet. e.g. '存入 HK$5,000 即享 100% 額外贈金，最多 HK$15,000，至 2026 年 7 月底前有效'
EXAMPLE — replace with real Bahasa Indonesia promo snippet. e.g. 'Dapatkan bonus deposit 25% hingga $2,000 untuk setoran pertama. Berlaku hingga 30 Juni 2026.'
